# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Payment gateway API (Stripe) external service entry"
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "payment-service"
    - "checkout-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-email-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "SendGrid email API external service entry"
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.sendgrid.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "notification-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-maps-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Google Maps API external service entry"
spec:
  hosts:
    - maps.googleapis.com
    - maps.google.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "location-service"
    - "delivery-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-auth0-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Auth0 identity provider external service entry"
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.auth0.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: NONE
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "auth-service"
    - "user-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: cloud-storage
  annotations:
    description: "AWS S3 bucket access for file storage"
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
    - "*.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com"
    - "*.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: NONE
  exportTo:
    - "*"

---
# --- External Database Service Entries ---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Primary PostgreSQL RDS instance"
spec:
  hosts:
    - primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
    - "user-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-readonly
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Read-only PostgreSQL RDS replica"
spec:
  hosts:
    - readonly-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp-postgres
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cluster
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "ElastiCache Redis cluster for caching"
spec:
  hosts:
    - redis-primary.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
    - redis-replica-1.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
    - redis-replica-2.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 6379
      name: tcp-redis
      protocol: TCP
    - number: 6380
      name: tcp-redis-tls
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "*"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb-atlas
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "MongoDB Atlas cluster for document storage"
spec:
  hosts:
    - cluster0-shard-00-00.abc12.mongodb.net
    - cluster0-shard-00-01.abc12.mongodb.net
    - cluster0-shard-00-02.abc12.mongodb.net
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 27017
      name: tcp-mongo
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "catalog-service"
    - "content-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "AWS Elasticsearch / OpenSearch domain"
spec:
  hosts:
    - search-prod-domain.us-east-1.es.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: TLS
    - number: 9200
      name: tcp-elasticsearch
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "search-service"
    - "logging-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-kafka-brokers
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-messaging
  annotations:
    description: "MSK Kafka brokers for event streaming"
spec:
  hosts:
    - broker-1.kafka.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
    - broker-2.kafka.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
    - broker-3.kafka.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 9092
      name: tcp-kafka-plaintext
      protocol: TCP
    - number: 9094
      name: tcp-kafka-tls
      protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
    - "*"

---
# --- Virtual Services for External Traffic Routing ---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Traffic routing and resilience for Stripe API"
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "payment-service"
    - "checkout-service"
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /v1/charges
        - uri:
            prefix: /v1/payment_intents
        - uri:
            prefix: /v1/refunds
      timeout: 15s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 5s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable,5xx
        retryRemoteLocalities: true
      fault:
        abort:
          percentage:
            value: 0
          httpStatus: 503
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.stripe.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 5s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.stripe.com
            port:
              number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-email-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Traffic routing for SendGrid email API"
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.sendgrid.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "notification-service"
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /v3/mail/send
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.sendgrid.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /v3/templates
      timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 5s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.sendgrid.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - timeout: 15s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 7s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.sendgrid.com
            port:
              number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-maps-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
  annotations:
    description: "Traffic routing for Google Maps API"
spec:
  hosts:
    - maps.googleapis.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "location-service"
    - "delivery-service"
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /maps/api/directions
      timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,5xx
      route:
        - destination:
            host: maps.googleapis.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /maps/api/geocode
      timeout: 8s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,5xx
      route:
        - destination:
            host: maps.googleapis.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /maps/api/distancematrix
      timeout: 12s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 5s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,5xx
      route:
        - destination:
            host: maps.googleapis.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 4s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure
      route:
        - destination:
            host: maps.googleapis.com
            port:
              number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Traffic routing for primary PostgreSQL RDS"
spec:
  hosts:
    - primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "order-service"
    - "inventory-service"
    - "user-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      timeout: 30s
      route:
        - destination:
            host: primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 5432

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-postgres-readonly
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Traffic routing for read-only PostgreSQL replica"
spec:
  hosts:
    - readonly-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "reporting-service"
    - "analytics-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      timeout: 60s
      route:
        - destination:
            host: readonly-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 5432

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-redis-cluster
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Traffic routing for ElastiCache Redis with failover"
spec:
  hosts:
    - redis-primary.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 6380
      timeout: 5s
      route:
        - destination:
            host: redis-primary.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 6380
          weight: 100
    - match:
        - port: 6379
      timeout: 5s
      route:
        - destination:
            host: redis-primary.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 6379
          weight: 100

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-mongodb-atlas
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Traffic routing for MongoDB Atlas sharded cluster"
spec:
  hosts:
    - cluster0-shard-00-00.abc12.mongodb.net
    - cluster0-shard-00-01.abc12.mongodb.net
    - cluster0-shard-00-02.abc12.mongodb.net
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "catalog-service"
    - "content-service"
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 27017
      timeout: 20s
      route:
        - destination:
            host: cluster0-shard-00-00.abc12.mongodb.net
            port:
              number: 27017
          weight: 34
        - destination:
            host: cluster0-shard-00-01.abc12.mongodb.net
            port:
              number: 27017
          weight: 33
        - destination:
            host: cluster0-shard-00-02.abc12.mongodb.net
            port:
              number: 27017
          weight: 33

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
  annotations:
    description: "Traffic routing for AWS OpenSearch domain"
spec:
  hosts:
    - search-prod-domain.us-east-1.es.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
    - "."
    - "search-service"
    - "logging-service"
  http:
    - match:
        - headers:
            x-service-caller:
              exact: search-service
      timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 4s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream
      route:
        - destination:
            host: search-prod-domain.us-east-1.es.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - headers:
            x-service-caller:
              exact: logging-service
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,5xx
      route:
        - destination:
            host: search-prod-domain.us-east-1.es.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 443
    - timeout: 15s
      retries:
        attempts: 2
        perTryTimeout: 5s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure
      route:
        - destination:
            host: search-prod-domain.us-east-1.es.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-kafka-brokers
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-messaging
  annotations:
    description: "Traffic routing for MSK Kafka brokers"
spec:
  hosts:
    - broker-1.kafka.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
    - broker-2.kafka.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
    - broker-3.kafka.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 9094
      timeout: 30s
      route:
        - destination:
            host: broker-1.kafka.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 9094
          weight: 34
        - destination:
            host: broker-2.kafka.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 9094
          weight: 33
        - destination:
            host: broker-3.kafka.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 9094
          weight: 33
    - match:
        - port: 9092
      timeout: 30s
      route:
        - destination:
            host: broker-1.kafka.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 9092
          weight: 34
        - destination:
            host: broker-2.kafka.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 9092
          weight: 33
        - destination:
            host: broker-3.kafka.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
            port:
              number: 9092
          weight: 33

---
# --- Destination Rules for External Services (TLS origination & connection pooling) ---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: api.stripe.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.stripe.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 5s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 30s
          probes: 3
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 60s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-email-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: api.sendgrid.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.sendgrid.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 5
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 120s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 120s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-maps-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: maps.googleapis.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: maps.googleapis.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
        connectTimeout: 3s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: UPGRADE
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 20
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 60s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 15s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 600s
          interval: 60s
          probes: 5
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-postgres-readonly
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: readonly-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: readonly-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 600s
          interval: 60s
          probes: 5
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-redis-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: redis-primary.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: redis-primary.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
        connectTimeout: 3s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 120s
          interval: 15s
          probes: 5
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 3
      interval: 5s
      baseEjectionTime: 15s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-mongodb-shard-00
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: cluster0-shard-00-00.abc12.mongodb.net
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: cluster0-shard-00-00.abc12.mongodb.net
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 30s
          probes: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50

---

metadata:
  name: dr-external-mongodb-shard-01
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database

  host: cluster0-shard-00-01.abc12.mongodb.net
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: cluster0-shard-00-01.abc12.mongodb.net
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 30s
          probes: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 10s

metadata:
  name: dr-external-mongodb-shard-02
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: cluster0-shard-00-02.abc12.mongodb.net
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: cluster0-shard-00-02.abc12.mongodb.net
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 30s
          probes: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: search-prod-domain.us-east-1.es.amazonaws.com
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: search-prod-domain.us-east-1.es.amazonaws.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 5s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 30s
          probes: 3
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: UPGRADE
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 3
        idleTimeout: 120s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 15s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50

---
# --- Sidecar resource to restrict egress from specific namespaces ---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: payment-service-egress
  namespace: payment-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
  annotations:
    description: "Restrict egress from payment-service namespace"
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: payment-service
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/api.stripe.com"
        - "istio-system/primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com"
        - "istio-system/redis-primary.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com"
        - "istio-system/*.kafka.us-east-1.amazonaws.com"
      port:
        number: 443
        protocol: TLS
        name: https
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com"
      port:
        number: 5432
        protocol: TCP
        name: tcp-postgres
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/redis-primary.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com"
      port:
        number: 6380
        protocol: TLS
        name: tcp-redis-tls

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: notification-service-egress
  namespace: notification-service
  labels:
    app: egress-config
  annotations:
    description: "Restrict egress from notification-service namespace"
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: notification-service
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/api.sendgrid.com"
        - "istio-system/*.kafka.us-east-1.amazonaws.com"
        - "istio-system/redis-primary.abc123.cache.amazonaws.com"

---
# --- Egress Gateway Configuration ---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: egress-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
  annotations:
    description: "Egress gateway for controlled external access"
spec:
  selector:
    istio: egressgateway
  servers:
    - port:
        number: 443
        name: tls-stripe
        protocol: TLS
      hosts:
        - api.stripe.com
      tls:
        mode: PASSTHROUGH
    - port:
        number: 443
        name: tls-sendgrid
        protocol: TLS
      hosts:
        - api.sendgrid.com
      tls:
        mode: PASSTHROUGH
    - port:
        number: 443
        name: tls-google-maps
        protocol: TLS
      hosts:
        - maps.googleapis.com
      tls:
        mode: PASSTHROUGH
    - port:
        number: 443
        name: tls-elasticsearch
        protocol: TLS
      hosts:
        - search-prod-domain.us-east-1.es.amazonaws.com
      tls:
        mode: PASSTHROUGH
    - port:
        number: 5432
        name: tcp-postgres-primary
        protocol: TLS
      hosts:
        - primary-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
      tls:
        mode: PASSTHROUGH
    - port:
        number: 5432
        name: tcp-postgres-readonly
        protocol: TLS
      hosts:
        - readonly-db.cluster-abc123.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com
      tls:
        mode: PASSTHROUGH
    - port:
        number: 27017
        name: tcp-mongodb
        protocol: TLS
      hosts:
        - cluster0-shard-00-00.abc12.mongodb.net
        - cluster0-shard-00-01.abc12.mongodb.net
        - cluster0-shard-00-02.abc12.mongodb.net
      tls:
        mode: PASSTHROUGH

---
# --- VirtualService to route through Egress Gateway for Stripe ---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-egress-gateway-stripe
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: egress-gateway-routing
  annotations:
    description: "Route Stripe traffic through egress gateway"
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.stripe.com
  gateways:
    - mesh
    - egress-gateway
  http:
    - match:
        - gateways:
            - mesh
          port: 443
      route:
        - destination:
            host: istio-egressgateway.istio-system.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - gateways:
            - egress-gateway
          port: 443
      timeout: 15s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 5s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,5xx
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.stripe.com
            port:
              number: 443

---
# --- VirtualService to route through Egress Gateway for SendGrid ---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-egress-gateway-sendgrid
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: egress-gateway-routing
  annotations:
    description: "Route SendGrid traffic through egress gateway"
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.sendgrid.com
  gateways:
    - mesh
    - egress-gateway
  http:
    - match:
        - gateways:
            - mesh
          port: 443
      route:
        - destination:
            host: istio-egressgateway.istio-system.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 443
    - match:
        - gateways:
            - egress-gateway
          port: 443
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.sendgrid.com
            port:
              number: 443
